progress_summary: Hardened tests/flags-skills.test.js — replaced the per-run recursive copy of the whole node_modules with a symlink. The copy was hundreds of MB / thousands of files and intermittently flaked or timed out under parallel test load (it surfaced as a spurious '1 failed' several times this session, always green in isolation). The spawned validator still resolves its deps through the symlink. Test now runs in ~1.1s (was ~3.7s) and passes 3/3 across repeated runs; full suite 345/345 in 3.5s (was ~6.8s). Next: cut the v1.4.3 Codex release.
next_actions: Cut v1.4.3 (extend opchain to Codex): bring the roadmap line forward from the tabled v1.8 slot, lockstep-bump all 18 skills to 1.4.3, styleguide badge + homepage pill, changelog hero entry, and flip site.feature.codex-install on so the install flow ships.
Hand off to a manual deploy (npm run deploy:staging → eyeball → npm run deploy) to actually activate Codex.
